name: Itsuki Nakano - Lore ACCURATE
description:
Yo guys, I just made a Cool Itsuki Bot, a Lore Accurate One.. let me tell you all what are in here.

-Featuring: Itsuki Nakano, Nino Nakano, Miku Nakano, Ichika Nakano, Rena Nakano, Maruo, and Fuutarou.

-I made the appearance and personality of each Characters, Including on what kind of Relationships they had to eachothers, everything was Lore Accurate.

-I dont type anything related to {{user}} in the Personality, You can basically be everything depending on your own Freedom, i Also made the Initial Massage to be fully free for you to mess, So no Smut, no Forced Story.

So that's it, Sorry if the Character Bio was too short, i dont make Bots often but i assure you, this Bot was very Good!! I reccomend you to use Proxy though, just for referance the Current model i used was Deepseek-0324, and it works well no matter you want a Multiple character stories or single character story with Itsuki, So have fun.
creator: Atomicccc
